title: Reflection и generics: открытые и закрытые типы

cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; Type open = typeof(Dictionary<,>); Type closed = typeof(Dictionary<int,string>); Console.WriteLine(open.IsGenericTypeDefinition); Console.WriteLine(closed.IsGenericTypeDefinition);

cards.prompt: List<> open, MakeGenericType(int) -> имя и instantiable до/после?
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; Type open = typeof(List<>); Console.WriteLine($"open def: {open.IsGenericTypeDefinition}, instantiable: {!open.ContainsGenericParameters}"); Type closed = open.MakeGenericType(typeof(int)); Console.WriteLine($"closed: {closed.Name}, instantiable: {!closed.ContainsGenericParameters}");
cards.expectedOutput:
open def: True, instantiable: False
closed: List`1, instantiable: True

cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; var args = typeof(Dictionary<int,string>).GetGenericArguments(); Console.WriteLine(args[0].Name); Console.WriteLine(args[1].Name);
